children.heading: .—Authority to Make Grants
children.label: a .—Authority to Make Grants
children.text: The Secretary shall make grants to encourage the development of new assistive technologies for specially adapted housing.

children.heading: .—Application
children.label: b .—Application
children.text: A person or entity seeking a grant under this section shall submit to the Secretary an application for the grant in such form and manner as the Secretary shall specify.
Each grant awarded under this section shall be in an amount of not more than $200,000 per fiscal year.
For each fiscal year in which the Secretary makes a grant under this section, the Secretary shall make the grant by not later than April 1 of that year.

children.heading: .—Use of Funds
children.label: d .—Use of Funds
children.text: The recipient of a grant under this section shall use the grant to develop assistive technologies for use in specially adapted housing.
the name of the grant recipient;
the amount of the grant; and

children.heading: .—Funding
children.label: f .—Funding
children.text: From amounts appropriated to the Department for readjustment benefits for each fiscal year for which the Secretary is authorized to make a grant under this section, $1,000,000 shall be available for that fiscal year for the purposes of the program under this section.

children.heading: .—Duration
children.label: g .—Duration
children.text: The authority to make a grant under this section shall begin on , and shall terminate on .October 1, 2011September 30, 2026
